Class Media

  • java.lang.Object
    • Media
  • public class Media
extends java.lang.Object
    represents all the media types and where ratings and reviews happen

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      Media​(Movie movie, Status status)
      constructs a movie media entry
      Media​(MusicArtist musicArtist, Status status)
      constructs a music artist media entry
      Media​(Videogame videogame, Status status)
      constructs a videogame media entry

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      java.lang.String displayInfo()
      display a summary of media entry
      Movie getMovie()
      get the movie object
      MusicArtist getMusicArtist()
      get the MusicArtist object
      int getRating()
      get rating of media entry
      java.lang.String getReview()
      get review of the media entry
      Status getStatus()
      get media status
      java.lang.String getTitle()
      get the title/name of the movie, videogame, or music artist based on media type
      java.lang.String getType()
      get Media type
      Videogame getVideogame()
      get the Videogame object
      boolean setRating​(int rating)
      set rating for media entry
      void setReview​(java.lang.String review)
      set review of media entry
      boolean setStatus​(Status status)
      set status of the media entry.

    • Constructor Detail

      • Media

        public Media​(Movie movie,
             Status status)
        constructs a movie media entry
        Parameters:
        movie - is the movie info
        status - initial status

      • Media

        public Media​(Videogame videogame,
             Status status)
        constructs a videogame media entry
        Parameters:
        videogame - is the videogame info
        status - initial status

      • Media

        public Media​(MusicArtist musicArtist,
             Status status)
        constructs a music artist media entry
        Parameters:
        musicArtist - is the musicArtist info
        status - initial status

      • getMovie

        get the movie object

      • getType

        public java.lang.String getType()
        get Media type
        Returns:
        Media type

      • getStatus

        public Status getStatus()
        get media status
        Returns:
        media status

      • setStatus

        public boolean setStatus​(Status status)
        set status of the media entry. if media type is music artist, cant set to completed unless all albums in the artist's discography is completed
        Parameters:
        status - is the new status
        Returns:
        true if status is set, otherwise print error message and return false

      • setRating

        public boolean setRating​(int rating)
        set rating for media entry
        Parameters:
        rating - new rating
        Returns:
        true if rating is set, otherwise return false and print error message

      • getRating

        public int getRating()
        get rating of media entry
        Returns:
        rating of media entry

      • setReview

        public void setReview​(java.lang.String review)
        set review of media entry
        Parameters:
        review - is the new review of media entry

      • getTitle

        public java.lang.String getTitle()
        get the title/name of the movie, videogame, or music artist based on media type
        Returns:
        title/name of the movie, videogame, or music artist

      • getReview

        public java.lang.String getReview()
        get review of the media entry
        Returns:
        review of media entry

      • displayInfo

        display a summary of media entry

        summary of media entry
